efs.accesspoint.posixuser.Gid.Docs: The POSIX group ID used for all file system operations using this access point.

efs.accesspoint.posixuser.SecondaryGids.Docs: Secondary POSIX group IDs used for all file system operations using this access point.

efs.accesspoint.posixuser.Uid.Docs: The POSIX user ID used for all file system operations using this access point.
